channel.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
OS Images

  • Windows 10 ARM - Community maintained Windows 10 on Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Models

  • Raspberry Pi Pico (January, 2021)

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
OS Images

  • openSUSE - openSUSE is a major Linux distribution that has images based for its stable release Leap and rolling release Tumbleweed. Images can be found for many of the Pis, including the Raspberry Pi 3 and Raspberry Pi 4.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Using openSUSE's YaST on the Raspberry Pi.

    • Community

  • openSUSE arm Mailing list

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • Lomoragestars13 - Private photo cloud host on Raspberry Pi, with Android/iOS/Web client.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
OS Images

  • Channels DVR Server - Custom image for Channels DVR Server which provides a whole home DVR system.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Models

  • Raspberry Pi 400 (November, 2020)

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
OS Images

  • Twister OS - Skinned version of Raspberry Pi OS with preinstalled apps like box86 and Retropie to introduce noobs to Linux and Raspberry Pi.
  • Raspberry Pi OS - The official supported Raspberry Pi OS (previously called "Raspbian"), based on Debian and available as a lite version.
  • Raspbian - Raspbian is a free operating system based on Debian optimized for the Raspberry Pi hardware.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Use a Raspberry Pi with Netflix - Tutorial on watching Netflix on a Raspberry Pi.

    • Resources

    Useful Apps

  • TeamViewer - Remote into Raspberry Pi while you are on the road!. Android
  • RaspController - Manage your Raspberry Pi remotely, control the GPIO ports, send commands directly through the terminal, view images from a connected camera and obtain data from different sensors. Android

    • OS Images

  • RasComm RaspberryPi MorseCode Translatorstars1 - RasComm is a communication device that translates plain text into Morse code (IMC) visually or audibly.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Books

  • Control Your Home with Raspberry Pi - Teaches you how to turn a Raspberry Pi into a secure, modular, open source and self-hosted home automation gateway with Docker Compose, MQTT and TLS.
  • Getting Started with Java on the Raspberry Pi - A lot of info and history about Java itself and how to install and use it on the Raspberry Pi with a lot of example projects.

    • Projects

  • Rhasspy - Open source, fully offline set of voice assistant services that works well with Home Assistant, Node-RED, MQTT and more.
  • Drumbooth controller with touch interfacestars2 - Project using Java, JavaFX, Pi4J and Arduino to control 8 relays and LED strips.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Atlas toolkitstars144 - Very lightweight and easy to install toolkit to write in Python single-page web applications to pilot your RPi, without having to install a web server.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • Internet Chronometerstars95 - Turn your Raspberry Pi in to an Internet Chronometer.
  • Pi-KVMstars2.8k - DIY KVM over IP to manage remote computers via Web UI or VNC with FullHD video, mouse, virtual drive, IPMI, Wake-on-LAN and many other things.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • WebStation SYSMONstars158 - An intuitive remotely-accessible system performance monitoring and task management tool for servers and headless Raspberry Pi setups.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Drago - Flexible configuration manager for Wireguard networks that is perfect for establishing secure overlays spanning multiple Raspberry Pis.
  • PiVPN - Create a full-featured OpenVPN/WireGuard VPN Server with a single bash command.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • Coder for Raspberry Pi - A open source project by Googlers to turn a Raspberry Pi into a simple, tiny, personal web server and web-based development environment.
  • Network Presence Detector - Setup a Pi Zero to scan for devices on a WiFi network and use that to determine who is "home".
  • P4wnP1stars3.2k - P4wnP1 is a highly customizable USB attack platform, based on a low cost Raspberry Pi Zero or Raspberry Pi Zero W (required for HID backdoor).
  • PoisonTapstars5.5k - Exploits locked/password protected computers over USB, drops persistent WebSocket-based backdoor, exposes internal router, and siphons cookies using Raspberry Pi Zero & Node.js.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Hardened Kernel Builder for RPistars8 - Cross-compile the Linux kernel for Raspberry Pi with enhanced security using a single command.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • AdGuard Homestars7.6k - DNS relay station with ad/tracker/other blocking, IP address redirections, and DNS-over-HTTPS.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
OS Images

  • Gladys Assistant - Gladys, a privacy-first, open-source home assistant.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 16th - Dec 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • Gaussmeterstars7 - Project utilizing a Raspberry Pi Zero W, WS2812B Leds and the Tesla API to collect and display a Tesla's status.
  • TeslaCamstars31 - Project utilizing a Raspberry Pi Zero W for USB Mass storage emulation and a PiJuice to collect and archive TeslaCam video.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • PiAware - Live flight tracking using a Raspberry Pi.
  • PiFmRdsstars1.1k - FM-RDS transmitter using a Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • Pwnagotchistars4.3k - Pwnagotchi is an AI based Wi-Fi cracking tool that learns from its surrounding WiFi environment to maximize the crackable WPA key material it captures.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • Orangetoolstars85 - Control functions for Single-Board computers in Python.

    • Projects

  • StreamPi - A robust alternative to the Elgato Stream Deck, that can launch apps, scripts, websites and control applications like OBS.

    • OS Images

  • LibreELEC - Just enough OS for Kodi

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • FruitNanny - Baby monitor including custom case, server, and client source code.
  • Smart Security Camera - Using OpenCV, Twilio and a WebCam/picam.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
OS Images

  • Manjaro - Friendly, open-source Linux distribution for Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
OS Images

  • PirateBox - Anonymous offline mobile file-sharing and communications system.

    • Tools

  • HealthyPistars141 - HAT which includes vital health monitoring like ECG, respiration, pulse oximetry and optional blood pressure & body temperature sensing.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Aug 5th - Aug 11th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • balenaEtcher - SD card burner app that is simple for end users, extensible for developers, and works on any platform.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • Stratuxstars787 - Open source ADS-B receiver which feeds weather, traffic, GPS, and AHRS data to electronic flight bag software via wifi.

    • Resources

    Swift programming

  • Setup Swift environment on Raspbian - Quick guide to help setup Swift environment on Raspbian Strech (lite).

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Models

  • Raspberry Pi 4, Model B (June, 2019)

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 3rd - Jun 9th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • Ceilstars31 - Auto-provisioned RPi cluster running K8S on bare-metal.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
OS Images

  • Ubuntu Server - Ubuntu Server distribution for the Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Apr 22nd - Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
OS Images

  • Android Things - Build connected devices for a wide variety of consumer, retail, and industrial applications.
  • balenaOS - open source OS to run Docker containers on embedded devices that's been designed for reliability and proven in production.
  • BerryBoot - Bootloader/universal OS installer, with support to VNC and HDMI-CEC.
  • CentOS - CentOS on the Raspberry Pi.
  • DroneBridgestars382 - A WifiBroadcast extension to make for a real alternative to DJI Lightbridge and other similar systems.
  • EZ-WifiBroadcast - Affordable Wireless Digital HD Video Transmission made easy.
  • FabScanPi - FabScanPi is an open source 3D laser scanner using the Raspberry Pi Camera Module.
  • Gentoo - Gentoo Stage 3 tarball for Raspberry Pi.
  • Hass.io - Home automation operating system/application for embedded device, also available standalone.
  • HypriotOS - Minimal Debian-based operating system, optimized to run Docker.
  • Kali Linux - Penetration Testing & Ethical Hacking Linux distro for ARM devices.
  • Kano OS - Open-source OS for exploration, creation, and play – free for Raspberry Pi and the new Pi 3.
  • Lakka - Retro-gaming on the Raspberry Pi built entirely on RetroArch.
  • Minibian - Minimal Raspbian (lighter than Jessie Lite).
  • MoodleBox - The MoodleBox provides a Moodle learning management system on Raspberry Pi.
  • motionEyeOS - Linux distribution that turns a single-board computer into a video surveillance system.
  • NetBSD - NetBSD is a free, fast, secure, and highly portable Unix-like Open Source operating system.
  • NextCloudPi - Nextcloud ready image based on Raspbian. Features Nextcloud 11 running on Raspbian 8, with PHP 7 and HTTP2 enabled Apache server.
  • NOOBS - New Out Of the Box Software, an easy OS installer for beginners.
  • OctoPi - Distribution for 3d printers.
  • OpenELEC - Open Embedded Linux Entertainment Center, a very lightweight Kodi build.
  • OpenMediaVault - OpenMediaVault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux containing services like SSH, (S)FTP, SMB/CIFS, DAAP media server, RSync, BitTorrent client and many more.
  • OpenWRT - OpenWrt is described as a Linux distribution for embedded devices for network management.
  • OSMC - Open Source Media Centre, based on Kodi.
  • PiDeck - Small form factor DVS system allowing you to control digital music files with timecode vinyl.
  • PiNet - System to manage Raspberry Pi classrooms.
  • RasPlex - Plex client for the Raspberry Pi.
  • Recalbox - Drag & drop light-weight retro-gaming and media center on the Raspberry Pi.
  • RetroPie - Retro-gaming on the Raspberry Pi.
  • Risc OS - Non-Linux OS originated from the group that developed the ARM microprocessor.
  • RuneAudio - Free and open source OS that turns embedded hardware into Hi-Fi music players.
  • Snappy Ubuntu Core - Official (minimal) Ubuntu distribution for IoT.
  • Ubuntu MATE - Ubuntu distribution for the Raspberry Pi based on MATE desktop.
  • Volumio - Headless audiophile music player, designed to play music with the highest possible fidelity.
  • Windows 10 IoT Core - Windows 10 distribution for IoT.

    • Tools

  • Alphastars26 - Remotely load, debug and test bare-metal programs using GDB with this system-level GDB server.
  • CusDeb - Web UI for creating custom images with specific packages installed.
  • iotwifistars242 - Wifi AP + Client management in 8MB Docker Container, with REST API for controlling wifi client and station modes simultaneously.
  • OpenVPN-Setupstars731 - Shell script to set up Raspberry Pi as an OpenVPN server.
  • pi-genstars1.6k - Tool used to create the raspberrypi.org Raspbian images. This can be used to create your own custom images with specific packages installed, etc.
  • PiBakery - The blocks based, easy to use setup tool for Raspberry Pi.
  • PiShrinkstars1.9k - Bash script that automatically shrinks a pi image that will then resize to the max size of the SD card on boot.
  • RaspAP-webguistars3k - A simple, responsive web interface to control wifi, hostapd and related services on the Raspberry Pi.
  • Raspbian QEMU with network - Simple tool to launch QEMU on Raspbian with the required modifications on the system and kernel. Automatic network access. Handy to create images in your PC.
  • Resin Bridgestars29 - Simple application/repo to bridge a Raspberry Pi's wlan0 interface to devices plugged into it over ethernet (eth0).
  • TorTiPistars80 - Shell script to automate the task of converting Raspberry Pi into a tor based wifi hotspot.
  • WiFi config generator - Simple tool to generate wpa_supplicant.conf files with wifi settings

    • Projects

  • BeeMonitor - Honey beehive monitoring project.
  • Bitcoin Trackerstars21 - A Physical Dashboard that displays Bitcoin stats in real time.
  • Building Timelapse with Resin - Remotely deploying timelapse camera using Docker, Resin, and 3G internet.
  • Circlestars850 - A C++ bare metal environment for Raspberry Pi.
  • clockOSstars37 - simple smart desktop clock using a Raspberry Pi display.
  • DIY USB Rubber Ducky - Raspberry Pi Zero Rubber Ducky recognized as a USB HID by just about anything with a USB port, thus allowing you to run custom scripts as if it were a keyboard.
  • docsis-cable-load-monitorstars48 - Tool to monitor downstream load on DOCSIS cable networks.
  • FistBump BLE Edition - WPA Hash Grabbing Bluetooth Peripheral / Android App.
  • Garage Door Openerstars36 - Garage door opener using the Garage Opener app to control garage door.
  • Harry Potter and the real life Daily Prophet - Display mimicking the Daily Prophet from Harry Potter using a 7" Raspberry Pi display.
  • Hearing aid prototoypestars64 - A Raspberry Pi powered prototype of a hearing aid.
  • Kubernetes on ARMstars572 - Get your ARM device up and running Kubernetes in less than ten minutes.
  • Looper/synth/drum thingstars854 - Sequencer/Drumpad, like Native Instruments' Maschine for the Pi.
  • Lumos - Smart Lamp for Better Sleep.
  • Magic Mirror - The original open source modular smart mirror platform.
  • Mini OONTZ - 3D printed mini MIDI controller.
  • Multi-Datacenter Cassandra on 32 Raspberry Pi’s - Showcase for the always on, fault tolerant nature of Cassandra using a Raspberry Pi cluster board.
  • NALIVATOR-9000stars16 - Robot bartender for making cocktails with Telegram-bot interface and speech synthesis on Golang.
  • NTP driven Nixie Clock - Nixie Tube Clock powered by a Raspberry Pi.
  • Occu-Pistars8 - Controller software for the Occu-pi, a totally awesome bathroom door sensor.
  • Pi Image Capturerstars6 - Captures images, integrated with the Google IOT Cloud Platform ecosystem.
  • pi_paymentsstars14 - Payment module based on RFID.
  • pi-timolostars451 - Remote Headless multi feature PiCamera Operation from Rclone Remote Storage Service and More.
  • PiClockstars508 - Fancy Clock built around a monitor and a Raspberry Pi.
  • PiFanTunerstars37 - CPU-fan-tuner daemon, just enables your fan as necessary.
  • PiScan - Makeshift Amazon Dash orders using a Raspberry PI + EAN scanner.
  • Planning lunch with a Slackbot on resin.io - Node.js Slackbot (lunchbot), hosted on Resin.
  • Power Sniffing Strip - Enclosure in a power strip, sniffing network data.
  • Raspberry Pi Erlang Cluster - Erlang cluster on a Raspberry Pi 2.
  • Raspberry PI Hadoop Cluster - Big Data cluster running on the Raspberry Pi.
  • RaspiBolt - Beginner’s Guide to ️⚡Lightning️⚡ on a Raspberry Pi.
  • RPi Motor Librarystars167 - Python 3 library to connect various motors & servos to the Pi.
  • RPI tempmonstars56 - CPU GPU temperature monitor with various functions such as LED GPIO, Graph output, email, alarm limit, notifications and logging.
  • SecPistars218 - Raspberry Pi based home alarm system.
  • Skate-o-Meter - Skateboard odometer and speedometer with RFID user system.
  • SkyJack - Take over and allow full control over any Parrot AR Drone within wireless distance.
  • Smart Mirrorstars2.6k - Voice controlled smart mirror with IoT integration.
  • Sonic Pistars7.9k - The Live Coding Music Synth for Everyone.
  • Sonusstars546 - Node.js voice control for your Pi (and everything else) with customizable offline hotword detection.
  • speed-camerastars567 - Object Motion Tracking uses python, openCV, USB Cam or picamera module to record speed data.
  • Vinyl Shelf Finder - Uses a tilt & pan laser to find a record in a record collection.
  • Voice Kit - AIY Voice Kit from Google, to build a standalone voice recognition system using the Google Assistant, or add voice recognition and natural language processing to your Raspberry Pi-based projects.
  • Wavesstars22 - Transforming the transience of the spoken word into something concrete and physical through a microphone, waveform and thermal printer.
  • Whispering Mirror - Interactive soundart installation using the Hifiberry DAC.
  • Wordpress using Dockerstars43 - Run a Wordpress site in containers with dynamic DNS.
  • Zelda Home Automation - Home automation based on sound recognition from notes played on an ocarina.

    • Resources

    Useful Apps

  • AndFTP - Alternative FTP client app. Android
  • Kore Remote - Official remote to control Kodi. Android
  • RasPi Check - To check Pi stats - frequency, temperature, volts and more system information (free memory, runtime, disk status). You can also restart or halt your Raspberry Pi and send custom commands. Android
  • VNC Viewer - To remotely control Raspberry Pi desktop. Android

    • Resources

    Articles

  • Raspberry Pi and why do I need one? - Intro into the Raspberry Pi and what can be done with it.
  • The Ultimate Raspberry Pi Security Guide - Extensive guide on security best practices for the Pi ie. exposed to the internet.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Auto Mount USB - Guide to setup Auto Mount USB on Raspberry Pi.
  • Build a $35 Time Capsule - Time Machine Backup Server.
  • DC++ Hub - Guide to setup an ADC (DC++) Hub on Raspberry Pi.
  • DIY Neural Network - Uses image recognition and Google’s Inception to recognize specific objects.
  • Docker Swarm with LetsEncrypt - Clear guidelines on how to set up a cluster with Docker, distributing services with Docker Compose and signing valid SSL certs with Letsencrypt.
  • How to setup a secure VPN server on Raspberry Pi or DigitalOcean - Simple, secure and detailed guide to setup VPN on your Raspberry Pi.
  • Moonlightstars1.3k - Nvidia GameStream implementation to stream your full collection of Steam games from desktop to the Raspberry Pi.
  • Raspbereumstars10 - Run your own Ethereum node on a Raspberry Pi.
  • Raspberry Pi login with SSH keys - Password-less login for ssh sessions on the Raspberry Pi.
  • Raspberry Pi Media Server Guides - Media Server and NAS tutorials from HTPC Guides.
  • Raspberry Pi Zero: Programming over USB - Guide to boot and access a Raspberry Pi Zero over a USB cable without need of an ethernet/wifi connection, keyboard or screen.
  • Turn the Raspberry Pi Zero into a mini dongle computer - Setup a pi0 to be able to ssh & vnc over USB.
  • Use a Raspberry Pi with multiple WiFi networks - Tutorial on using a Raspberry Pi with multiple networks.

    • Resources

    Swift programming

  • BuildSwiftOnARMstars456 - All you need to build Swift on a RaspberryPi or other ARM boards, updated to Swift 4.1.3.
  • Swishstars265 - Build Swift Projects on a remote machine within Xcode.

    • Community

  • raspberry-pi on Spectrum
  • Official Blog
  • Official Forum
  • Raspberry Pi Jam — Official conferences
  • Reddit Projects
  • Reddit
  • StackExchange

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

Swift programming

  • Compile Swift for Raspberry Pi by Xcode - Quick tutorial to share the way to help setup compiling Raspberry Pi code with Xcode.
  • SwiftyGPIOstars1.2k - Swift library for hardware projects on Linux/ARM boards with support for GPIOs/SPI/I2C/PWM/UART/1Wire.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Nov 19th - Nov 25th, 2018
item.description:
Models

  • Raspberry Pi 3, Model A+ (November, 2018)

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 8th - Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
Community

  • Raspberry Pi on YouTube
  • MAKE on Youtube
  • Novaspirittech on YouTube

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Projects

  • RaspiBlitzstars1.4k - Fastest and cheapest way to get your own Lightning Node running.

    • OS Images

  • SARPi - Stands for the Slackware ARM on Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Models

  • Raspberry Pi 1, Model A & Model B (2012, discontinued)
  • Raspberry Pi 1, Model B+ (July, 2014)
  • Raspberry Pi 1, Model A+ (November, 2014)
  • Raspberry Pi 2, Model B (February, 2015)
  • Raspberry Pi Zero (November, 2015)
  • Raspberry Pi 3, Model B (March, 2016)
  • Raspberry Pi Zero W (February, 2017)
  • Raspberry Pi 3, Model B+ (March, 2018)

    • Tools

  • Processing - Processing Development Environment running on Raspberry Pi.

    • Resources

    Useful Apps

  • Raspicast - Cast YouTube videos, media content from your android device, Play local media files, Play streams from playlists (m3u, pls) on your Raspberry Pi. Android
  • Turbo FTP - A good FTP client app for accessing files on raspberry. Android
  • Termius - One of the cleanest SSH Client for Pi. Android, iOS
  • Home Remote Control - Control mouse/keyboard, volume, manage download/upload files, custom commands, terminal, execute tasks in future, control media. Android
  • Screen Stream Mirroring - To stream your phone screen directly to Pi. Android
  • Tubio - Cast web videos directly to Pi. Android

    • Resources

    Articles

  • Raspberry Pi Beginners - Guide to setup the Raspberry Pi for beginners.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Bridging Wifi to the Raspberry Pi over Ethernet - Set up tethered networking between macOS & Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
OS Images

  • SamplerBox - Drop'n'play sampler: drop .WAV samples on the SD card, and play!

    • Projects

  • Project MyHouse - Smart Doll House with Gesture Recognition, using Raspberry Pi 3 or Pi Zero and PSMove motion controller.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Piemanstars160 - Script for creating custom images based on Raspbian, Devuan, Ubuntu and Alpine Linux.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
OS Images

  • Rocket Show - Play synced backing tracks, videos and DMX light-sequences live on stage.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
OS Images

  • OpenHABian - A preconfigured version of the OpenHAB home automation software.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Articles

  • Raspberry Pi A to Z Liststars890 - Comprehensive list with links to common questions & pitfalls.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
OS Images

  • DietPistars2.5k - Minimal image designed to fit on a 2GB SD card, with tons of configurable settings and scripts.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Turn a Raspberry Pi into a Plex Media Server - Beginners guide to setting up a Plex media server to stream all of your media content.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
OS Images

  • FreeBSD - FreeBSD is an advanced computer operating system used to power modern servers, desktops, and embedded platforms.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Projects

  • PiE-Ink - E-ink nametag display running on a Pi Zero.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
OS Images

  • Fedora - Linux Fedora distribution built for the Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
Projects

  • Pi4j Project - Java I/O library the Raspberry Pi.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Raspberry Pi Game Console - How to Build a Raspberry Pi Retro Game Console for $35.

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
OS Images

  • Alpine Linux - Security-oriented, lightweight Linux distribution based on musl libc and busybox.
  • Arch Linux ARM - Lightweight and flexible Linux distribution that tries to Keep It Simple.
  • chilipie-kioskstars950 - Image which boots directly into full-screen Chrome, perfect for dashboards and build monitors.

    • Tools

  • ApplePi Bakery - macOS application to easily install/backup/restore images onto an SD card.

    • Projects

  • 40-node Raspberry Pi Cluster - Cluster aimed to be under the size of full tower desktop.
  • Building a Ceph Cluster on Raspberry Pi - Highly redundant and low power usage RADOS home storage solution.
  • Chromebook Charger Kiosk - Timed charging station for students using Chromebooks at school.
  • Jasper - Flexible open source personal assistant.
  • Lightberry - Led lighting solution dedicated for raspberry pi and your TV.
  • Movelstars119 - Raspberry Pi car computer.
  • Nerves Project - Craft and deploy bulletproof embedded software in Elixir.
  • Pi-hole - Black hole for internet ads.

    • Resources

    Articles

  • 10 Ways To Power - Information about different & correct ways to power the pi.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Controlling Spotify with Slack and a Raspberry Pi - Node.js project to control Spotify & Slack with libspotify.
  • How To Make a Raspberry Pi Turn on a Lamp with iBeacon™ Technology - Good beginners-guide to working with Beacon technology.

    • Community

  • @Raspberry_Pi on Twitter
  • #raspberrypi on Freenode
  • eLinux Hub
